creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
RStudio-1.1.409_1 now fails with:
> $ rstudio --run-diagnostics
>
> Using R script: /usr/local/bin/R
>
> Attempting to launch R session...
> ...skipped...
>
> R session launched, attempting to connect on port 27441...
> /lib/libgcc_s.so.1: version GCC_4.6.0 required by /usr/local/lib/gcc6/libgfortran.so.3 not found

RStudio doesn't show menus as a result, therefore it is unusable.
It worked when it was updated on 2018-01-17.

11.1-STABLE r328587. All packages have been fully updated yesterday with 'pkg upgrade -f'.
